BougeRV Movable Area Light

Buy for $24 (Reg. $40)

What we love

If you’ve got outdoor summer adventures awaiting you, this BougeRV portable area light would make a handy addition to your kit, though it’s also a convenient device to have year-round, too. It possesses an internal 3,200mAh battery that can handle lighting spaces, tents, more for up to six nights on each charge, complete with five adjustable brightness levels, four lighting modes, and an emergency S.O.S. signal. What’s more, it has the double function to power personal devices as a power bank.

Despite its $1,900 MSRP, you can usually find this model starting at $1,700, with 2026 having given us discounts down to $1,637 before this rate became the more frequent price point we’ve seen during sales. For the rest of May, you can jump on it with a $200 markdown off the going rate (and $400 off the MSRP), giving you a more thrill-inducing ride for the all-time lowest price we have tracked, which lands $1,000 under the newest GT3 Pro Electric SuperScooter currently.

If you plan to attend one of the most influential gatherings in tech this year, now is the time to lock in your pass before rates go up again.
